# Workflow DSL feature matrix

<!-- Generated by `make docs` from internal/workflow (see `goobers features`). DO NOT edit by hand. -->

Every workflow-DSL feature this build of goobers understands, with its current support level and the version it entered that level. Run `goobers features` to print this table from the running binary, or `goobers features --used` to list only the features a given instance references.

| Feature | Support | Since |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `gate.branch.escalate` | ga | dev |
| `gate.branches` | ga | dev |
| `gate.evaluator.agentic` | ga | dev |
| `gate.evaluator.agentic.goober` | ga | dev |
| `gate.evaluator.agentic.retry` | ga | dev |

| `gate.evaluator.agentic.retry.maxAttempts` | ga | dev |
